Ophiopogon is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. The health benefits of Ophiopogon are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties, which are said to help in reducing stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system.

Ophiopogon is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine and is often made into herbal preparations such as tea, capsules, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including insomnia, anxiety, and digestive issues.
